popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description: Anne Roos was born in 1465 in Westmorland, England. She had one daughter with John Bray in 1497. She died in 1500 in England at the age of 35.

sourceList.title: Book - The Virginian Magazine of History & Biography  vol 29

zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne de Ros於1465年出生在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德時，她的父親Thomas de Ros35歲，母親Anne Thornborough25歲。她於1488年與Sir John Dixon在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1510年在英國米德萊可倫敦享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne de Ros于1465年出生在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德时，她的父亲Thomas de Ros35岁，母亲Anne Thornborough25岁。她于1488年与Sir John Dixon在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1510年在英国米德萊可倫敦享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ros
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Enrique, Luis, Jose, Alberto, Eduardo, Rafael, Elena, Fidel, Joaquin, Manuel, Pablo, Ramon.  Southeast Asian Leang, Phon, Lap, Phan, Pho, Saroeun, Sophal, Sophan, Sophea, Tha, Thang, Yen.
Catalan: nickname for someone with blond hair or a fair complexion, ultimately from Latin russus.

variants.name: Rus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Romanian Simion, Grigore, Doina, Dorel, Ilie, Liviu, Petru, Vasile.

Czech, Slovak, and Romanian (of Slavic origin): ethnic name for a Russian, ultimately derived from an Old Norse term meaning ‘oarsman, rower’ (from the root roths-), a reference to the fact that the Russian state was established by Scandinavians who rowed their ships up rivers inland from the Baltic sea. In some cases this may also be origin of the Slovenian and Croatian surname (see 3 below).
Czech: descriptive nickname from the adjective rusý ‘blond’.

variants.name: Ross
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from one or other of a number of Scottish and English places called Ross or Roos(e), especially Roose (Lancashire) and Roos (East Yorkshire). The placenames derive from a British ancestor of Welsh rhos ‘moor, heath, plain’, which is the sense of the cognate Gaelic word ros. The Scottish surname has at least three origins. First, the Anglo-Norman family from Roos (East Yorkshire) was introduced to Scotland when Robert of Roos, lord of Wark Castle (Northumberland), married Isabella, an illegitimate daughter of King William the Lion. Second, various families took the name from the province of Ross in northern Scotland and other places of that name. Third, there were Norman families in Scotland by the 13th century who probably derived their name from Rots in Normandy (see 2 below). The descendants of Godfrey de Ros, tenant of the de Morville lords of Cunninghame, were major landholders in Ayrshire, and almost certainly took their name from Rots. The Rose family of Kilravock (Nairnshire) may take their name from either of these three (see Rose ). The lairds of Balnagown adopted the surname Ross after the earldom of Ross (to which they considered themselves rightful heirs) had passed into other hands through the female line.

English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Rots in Calvados (France), probably named with the ancient Germanic element rod ‘clearing’ (compare Rhodes ). This was the original home of a family de Ros, who were established in Kent in 1130 and had major estates in Kent until well into the 13th century.

English: habitational name from Wrose, in Shipley, near Bradford (Yorkshire), with re-spelling of Wr- as R- due to the loss of /w/ before /r/ in early modern English pronunciation. The spelling Wrose is no longer current. The placename derives from Old English wrāse ‘knot, something twisted’, referring to the steep-sided hill on which the settlement stands, with the sense ‘broken or twisting hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne de Ros was born in 1465, in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas de Ros, was 35 and her mother, Anne Thornborough, was 25. She married Sir John Dixon in 1488, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1510, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne de Ros est née en 1465, à Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Ros, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Anne Thornborough, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Dixon en 1488, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1510, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne de Ros 1465 in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Ros 35 und ihre Mutter Anne Thornborough 25. Sie hat 1488 in London, Middlesex, England Sir John Dixon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1510 im Alter von 45 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne de Ros è nata il nel 1465 nel Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas de Ros, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Anne Thornborough, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Dixon nel 1488, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1510, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne de Rosが1465年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドで生まれた時，父Thomas de Rosは35歳，母Anne Thornboroughは25歳であった。1488年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでSir John Dixonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1510年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne de Ros(이)가 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Ros(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Thornborough(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1488년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Sir John Dixon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne de Ros nasceu em 1465, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de Ros, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Anne Thornborough, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Dixon em 1488, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1510, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne de Ros родилась в 1465 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas de Ros было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Thornborough, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Dixon в 1488 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1510 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne de Ros nació en 1465, en Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas de Ros, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Anne Thornborough, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir John Dixon en 1488, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1510, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años.
